    description: StatefulSet name of the replica set members.
  replica_set_name:
    default: mongodb-replica
    description: MongoDB replica set _id used when initiating the set.
  fault_host_suffix:
    default: mongo-wrong
    description: Bad host suffix injected to break a member's configuration.
  app_database:
    default: app
    description: Application database seeded with data.
  app_collection:
    default: test
    description: Application collection seeded with data.

prompt: |
  Replica set is not healthy. Restore a stable 3-member replica set without data loss.

namespace_contract:
  required_roles: []

metrics:
  - time_to_first_mutation

preconditionUnits:
  - name: mongo_env_ready
    on_probe_fail: skip
    probe:
      # AUTHORITATIVE skip-if-running probe (P32): succeed when the canonical
      # StatefulSet exists OR any pod is Running, so the destructive namespace
      # rebuild below is skipped on an inherited cluster even if its pods are
      # momentarily not Running (mid-restart from a prior stage) -- the
      # StatefulSet persists across that window. The bare `grep -c Running`
      # could miss such a cluster and clobber inherited state.
      - command: "/bin/sh -c 'kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset {{params.cluster_prefix}} >/dev/null 2>&1 || kubectl -n mongodb get pods 2>/dev/null | grep -q Running'"
        timeout_sec: 10
    apply:
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c '
          kubectl delete namespace mongodb --ignore-not-found=true; kubectl wait --for=delete namespace/mongodb --timeout=120s || true
          '
        sleep: 2
      - command: "kubectl create namespace mongodb"
        sleep: 1
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/initialize/resource/services.yaml"
        sleep: 2
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/initialize/resource/statefulset.yaml"
        sleep: 5
      - command: |
          for i in $(seq 1 120); do
            ready=$(kubectl -n mongodb get sts {{params.cluster_prefix}} -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>/dev/null)
            if [ "${ready:-0}" -ge 3 ]; then
              exit 0
            fi
            sleep 5
          done
          exit 1
        sleep: 2
      # Pod-Ready != mongod accepting TCP (§1.10): ping-until-ok before rs.initiate.
      - command: |
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.runCommand({ping:1}).ok' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 1 && exit 0
            sleep 3
          done
          exit 1
        sleep: 2
      - command: |
          kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval '
          rs.initiate({_id:"{{params.replica_set_name}}",members:[
            {_id:0,host:"mongodb-replica-0.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"},
            {_id:1,host:"mongodb-replica-1.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"},
            {_id:2,host:"mongodb-replica-2.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"}
          ]})'
        sleep: 5
      - command: |
          for i in $(seq 1 20); do
            kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.hello().isWritablePrimary' | grep true && exit 0
            sleep 3
          done
          exit 1
        sleep: 2
      - command: |
          kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval '
          cfg = rs.conf();
          cfg.members[1].host = "mongodb-replica-1.{{params.fault_host_suffix}}.svc.cluster.local:27017";
          cfg.version += 1;
          rs.reconfig(cfg);
          '
        sleep: 5
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.getSiblingDB(\"{{params.app_database}}\").{{params.app_collection}}.insertMany([{x:1},{x:2},{x:3}], {writeConcern:{w:1}});'"
        sleep: 2
    verify:
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb get pods 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running"
        timeout_sec: 10

  # Additive data fixture (composition safety): the oracle requires >= 3 docs in
  # {{params.app_database}}.{{params.app_collection}}. When this case runs chained on an inherited cluster the
  # destructive `apply` above is skipped, so a prior stage may have left the
  # collection short. This unit tops it up ADDITIVELY to the required count WITHOUT
  # dropping/recreating the collection or touching the namespace/cluster.
  # The probe gates on the DATA COUNT (not "pods Running"), so it runs
  # whenever the collection is short; standalone (where `apply` already seeded 3)
  # it sees the required count and skips -> identical behaviour. Idempotent: inserts
  # only the deficit (required - current).
  - name: mongo_seed_fixture
    on_probe_fail: skip
    probe:
      # Auth-adaptive: when an inherited cluster has auth enabled the admin secret
      # exists, so authenticate; otherwise connect plain. Works both ways.
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 't=""; for cca in /etc/tls/ca.crt /etc/mongo-ca/ca.crt; do kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- ls $cca >/dev/null 2>&1 && { t="--tls --tlsAllowInvalidHostnames --tlsAllowInvalidCertificates --tlsCAFile $cca"; break; }; done; au=""; pw=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pw" ] && au="-u admin-user -p $pw --authenticationDatabase admin"; n=$(P=""; for _pi in $(seq 1 30); do P=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''rs.hello().primary'\'' 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); [ -n "$P" ] && break; sleep 2; done; P=${P:-mongodb-replica-0}; kubectl -n mongodb exec "$P" -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''db.getSiblingDB("{{params.app_database}}").{{params.app_collection}}.countDocuments({})'\'' 2>/dev/null | tr -dc 0-9); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 3 ] && echo ok | grep -c ok'
        timeout_sec: 30
    apply:
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 'au=""; pw=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pw" ] && au="-u admin-user -p $pw --authenticationDatabase admin"; P=""; for _pi in $(seq 1 30); do P=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet $au --eval '\''rs.hello().primary'\'' 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); [ -n "$P" ] && break; sleep 2; done; P=${P:-mongodb-replica-0}; kubectl -n mongodb exec "$P" -- mongosh --quiet $au --eval '\''var c=db.getSiblingDB("{{params.app_database}}").{{params.app_collection}}; var need=3-c.countDocuments({}); var docs=[]; for(var i=0;i<need;i++){docs.push({seed:"fixture",ts:new Date()});} if(docs.length>0){c.insertMany(docs,{writeConcern:{w:1}});}'\'''
        sleep: 2
    verify:
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 't=""; for cca in /etc/tls/ca.crt /etc/mongo-ca/ca.crt; do kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- ls $cca >/dev/null 2>&1 && { t="--tls --tlsAllowInvalidHostnames --tlsAllowInvalidCertificates --tlsCAFile $cca"; break; }; done; au=""; pw=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pw" ] && au="-u admin-user -p $pw --authenticationDatabase admin"; n=$(P=""; for _pi in $(seq 1 30); do P=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''rs.hello().primary'\'' 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); [ -n "$P" ] && break; sleep 2; done; P=${P:-mongodb-replica-0}; kubectl -n mongodb exec "$P" -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''db.getSiblingDB("{{params.app_database}}").{{params.app_collection}}.countDocuments({})'\'' 2>/dev/null | tr -dc 0-9); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 3 ]'
        timeout_sec: 30

oracle:
  verify:
    commands:
      - command: "python3 cases/mongodb/initialize/oracle/oracle.py"
        timeout_sec: 180

1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	import argparse
3	import base64
4	import json
5	import os
6	import subprocess
7	import sys
8	import time

11	NAMESPACE = os.environ.get("BENCH_NAMESPACE", "mongodb")
12	CLUSTER_PREFIX = os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_CLUSTER_PREFIX", "mongodb-replica")
13	HEADLESS_SERVICE = os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_HEADLESS_SERVICE_NAME", "mongodb-replica-svc")
14	REPLICA_SET_NAME = os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_REPLICA_SET_NAME", CLUSTER_PREFIX)
15	APP_DATABASE = os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_APP_DATABASE", "app")
16	APP_COLLECTION = os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_APP_COLLECTION", "test")
17	SEED_DOCS = int(os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_SEED_DOCS", "3"))
18	
19	
20	def run(cmd, timeout=30):
21	    """Run a command bounded (O17): a hung kubectl/mongosh exec becomes a
22	    failed attempt instead of an uncaught TimeoutExpired that would crash the
23	    whole oracle at its deadline."""
24	    try:
25	        return subprocess.run(cmd, text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
26	                              stderr=subprocess.PIPE, timeout=timeout)
27	    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
28	        return subprocess.CompletedProcess(cmd, 124, "", "timed out")
29	
30	
31	_ADMIN_PW = None
32	
33	
34	def _admin_auth_flags():
35	    """`-u <admin> -p <pw> --authenticationDatabase admin` when the admin secret
36	    exists. The env PERSISTS across stages, so a prior deploy stage may have
37	    enabled auth (keyfile + admin user), after which rs.conf()/rs.status()
38	    require credentials. Empty when no admin secret is present (standalone,
39	    pre-auth) so the plain connection is used. Cached."""
40	    global _ADMIN_PW
41	    if _ADMIN_PW is None:
42	        secret = os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_ADMIN_SECRET_NAME", "admin-user-password")
43	        r = run(["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "get", "secret", secret,
44	                 "-o", "jsonpath={.data.password}"])
45	        pw = ""
46	        if r.returncode == 0 and r.stdout.strip():
47	            try:
48	                pw = base64.b64decode(r.stdout.strip()).decode()
49	            except Exception:
50	                pw = ""
51	        _ADMIN_PW = pw
52	    if _ADMIN_PW:
53	        user = os.environ.get("BENCH_PARAM_ADMIN_USERNAME", "admin-user")
54	        return ["-u", user, "-p", _ADMIN_PW, "--authenticationDatabase", "admin"]
55	    return []
56	
57	
58	_TLS_FLAGS_CACHE = None
59	
60	
61	def _mongo_tls_flags(probe_pod=None):
62	    """mongosh transport flags that adapt to the cluster's LIVE TLS mode.
63	
64	    The environment PERSISTS across workflow stages, so an earlier stage
65	    (mongodb/tls-setup or mongodb/certificate-rotation) may have turned TLS on,
66	    after which a plain mongosh connection is refused. Detect TLS by probing the
67	    running mongo pod for a CA cert mounted at the paths the TLS stages use; if
68	    present, connect with --tls --tlsCAFile (and a client cert for mutual TLS
69	    when one is mounted), else connect plain. Standalone (no CA mounted) this
70	    returns [] -> identical plain behaviour. It only adds transport flags; every
71	    real check still runs and still fails when its condition is unmet.
72	    """
73	    global _TLS_FLAGS_CACHE
74	    if _TLS_FLAGS_CACHE is not None:
75	        return list(_TLS_FLAGS_CACHE)
76	    flags = []
77	    pod = probe_pod or f"{CLUSTER_PREFIX}-0"
78	    ca_path = None
79	    for cand in (
80	        "/etc/tls/ca.crt",
81	        "/etc/mongo-ca/ca.crt",
82	        "/etc/mongodb/tls/ca.crt",
83	        "/etc/ssl/mongodb/ca.crt",
84	    ):
85	        probe = run(["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "exec", pod, "--", "/bin/sh", "-c", "test -f " + cand])
86	        if probe.returncode == 0:
87	            ca_path = cand
88	            break
89	    if ca_path:
90	        flags = ["--tls", "--tlsAllowInvalidHostnames", "--tlsAllowInvalidCertificates", "--tlsCAFile", ca_path]
91	        for client_pem in ("/etc/tls/client.pem", "/etc/mongo-ca/client.pem"):
92	            cprobe = run(["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "exec", pod, "--", "/bin/sh", "-c", "test -f " + client_pem])
93	            if cprobe.returncode == 0:
94	                flags += ["--tlsCertificateKeyFile", client_pem]
95	                break
96	    _TLS_FLAGS_CACHE = flags
97	    return list(flags)
98	
99	def _resolve_expected_replicas():
100	    """Topology size to enforce: param-first, defaulting to 3 (O2 exception).
101	
102	    The member count IS this case's graded outcome -- the prompt promises a
103	    3-member replica set -- so it is never derived from the live cluster
104	    (live-deriving would mask a failed or partial deployment). An explicit
105	    ``expected_replicas``/``target_replicas`` param override wins, else 3.
106	    """
107	    for key in ("BENCH_PARAM_EXPECTED_REPLICAS", "BENCH_PARAM_TARGET_REPLICAS"):
108	        val = os.environ.get(key)
109	        if val is not None and str(val).strip():
110	            try:
111	                return int(val)
112	            except ValueError:
113	                pass
114	    return 3
115	
116	
117	EXPECTED_REPLICAS = _resolve_expected_replicas()
118	
119	
120	def fail(prefix, errors):
121	    if errors:
122	        print(prefix, file=sys.stderr)
123	        for err in errors:
124	            print(f"  - {err}", file=sys.stderr)
125	        return 1
126	    return 0
127	
128	
129	def mongo_eval(pod, script):
130	    # Connect via the member's own FQDN with directConnection=true to skip SDAM
131	    # topology monitoring, which a bare localhost connection would start and
132	    # which fails under a persisted requireTLS mode. directConnection works on
133	    # any single member for rs.conf()/rs.status() reads.
134	    uri = (f"mongodb://{pod}.{HEADLESS_SERVICE}.{NAMESPACE}.svc.cluster.local:27017/"
135	           "?directConnection=true")
136	    base = ["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "exec", pod, "--",
137	            "mongosh", "--quiet", *_mongo_tls_flags(), uri]
138	    res = run(base + ["--eval", script])
139	    # Adaptive auth: a deploy stage may have enabled auth, so a plain rs.conf()
140	    # fails "requires authentication". Retry once with the live admin credentials.
141	    out = ((res.stderr or "") + (res.stdout or "")).lower()
142	    if res.returncode != 0 and (
143	        "requires authentication" in out or "not authorized" in out
144	        or "unauthorized" in out or "authentication failed" in out
145	    ):
146	        af = _admin_auth_flags()
147	        if af:
148	            res = run(base + af + ["--eval", script])
149	    return res
150	
151	
152	_PRIMARY_POD_CACHE = None
153	
154	
155	def find_primary():
156	    """Locate the replica-set PRIMARY replica-set pod, falling back to CLUSTER_PREFIX-0.
157	
158	    The environment PERSISTS across workflow stages, so an earlier stage (or
159	    this case's own election) can move the PRIMARY off pod-0. countDocuments
160	    requires the primary -- on a secondary it fails "not primary and
161	    secondaryOk=false" (O8). Exec db.hello() into each replica-set member and route
162	    the data read to the writable primary; standalone this resolves to pod-0
163	    -> identical behaviour. Copied from decommission's oracle. Cached.
164	    """
165	    global _PRIMARY_POD_CACHE
166	    if _PRIMARY_POD_CACHE is not None:
167	        return _PRIMARY_POD_CACHE
168	    for idx in range(9):
169	        pod = f"{CLUSTER_PREFIX}-{idx}"
170	        res = mongo_eval(pod, "db.hello().isWritablePrimary")
171	        if res.returncode != 0:
172	            if idx > 0 and "NotFound" in (res.stderr or ""):
173	                break
174	            continue
175	        if "true" in (res.stdout or ""):
176	            _PRIMARY_POD_CACHE = pod
177	            return pod
178	    return f"{CLUSTER_PREFIX}-0"
179	
180	
181	def mongo_json(pod, script, label, errors):
182	    res = mongo_eval(pod, script)
183	    if res.returncode != 0:
184	        detail = res.stderr.strip() or res.stdout.strip() or f"exit {res.returncode}"
185	        errors.append(f"{label} failed on {pod}: {detail}")
186	        return None
187	    raw = (res.stdout or "").strip()
188	    if not raw:
189	        errors.append(f"{label} returned empty output on {pod}")
190	        return None
191	    try:
192	        return json.loads(raw)
193	    except json.JSONDecodeError:
194	        errors.append(f"Unable to parse {label} JSON output on {pod}")
195	        return None
196	
197	
198	def expected_hosts():
199	    return {
200	        f"{CLUSTER_PREFIX}-{i}.{HEADLESS_SERVICE}.{NAMESPACE}.svc.cluster.local:27017"
201	        for i in range(EXPECTED_REPLICAS)
202	    }
203	
204	
205	def check_topology():
206	    errors = []
207	    pod = f"{CLUSTER_PREFIX}-0"
208	    conf = mongo_json(pod, "JSON.stringify(rs.conf())", "rs.conf()", errors)
209	    if isinstance(conf, dict):
210	        members = conf.get("members", [])
211	        if len(members) != EXPECTED_REPLICAS:
212	            errors.append(f"Expected {EXPECTED_REPLICAS} members in rs.conf(), got {len(members)}")
213	        actual_hosts = {m.get("host") for m in members if m.get("host")}
214	        want_hosts = expected_hosts()
215	        if actual_hosts != want_hosts:
216	            errors.append(f"Replica set hosts mismatch: expected={sorted(want_hosts)} actual={sorted(actual_hosts)}")
217	
218	    status = mongo_json(pod, "JSON.stringify(rs.status())", "rs.status()", errors)
219	    if isinstance(status, dict):
220	        set_name = status.get("set")
221	        if set_name != REPLICA_SET_NAME:
222	            errors.append(f"Replica set name expected {REPLICA_SET_NAME}, got {set_name}")
223	
224	    return fail("MongoDB initialize topology check failed:", errors)
225	
226	
227	def _health_attempt():
228	    errors = []
229	    pod = f"{CLUSTER_PREFIX}-0"
230	    status = mongo_json(pod, "JSON.stringify(rs.status())", "rs.status()", errors)
231	    if isinstance(status, dict):
232	        members = status.get("members", [])
233	        primary = sum(1 for m in members if m.get("stateStr") == "PRIMARY")
234	        secondary = sum(1 for m in members if m.get("stateStr") == "SECONDARY")
235	        if primary != 1:
236	            errors.append(f"Expected 1 PRIMARY, got {primary}")
237	        if secondary != EXPECTED_REPLICAS - 1:
238	            errors.append(f"Expected {EXPECTED_REPLICAS - 1} SECONDARY, got {secondary}")
239	
240	    sts = run(["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "get", "sts", CLUSTER_PREFIX, "-o", "json"])
241	    if sts.returncode != 0:
242	        detail = sts.stderr.strip() or sts.stdout.strip() or f"exit {sts.returncode}"
243	        errors.append(f"Failed to read statefulset {CLUSTER_PREFIX}: {detail}")
244	    else:
245	        try:
246	            sts_obj = json.loads(sts.stdout)
247	        except json.JSONDecodeError:
248	            errors.append("Failed to parse statefulset JSON")
249	            sts_obj = {}
250	        spec_replicas = sts_obj.get("spec", {}).get("replicas")
251	        ready_replicas = sts_obj.get("status", {}).get("readyReplicas", 0)
252	        if spec_replicas != EXPECTED_REPLICAS:
253	            errors.append(f"StatefulSet replicas expected {EXPECTED_REPLICAS}, got {spec_replicas}")
254	        if ready_replicas != EXPECTED_REPLICAS:
255	            errors.append(f"Ready replicas expected {EXPECTED_REPLICAS}, got {ready_replicas}")
256	
257	    return errors
258	
259	
260	def check_health():
261	    # O-flap-restart: restoring/reforming the set leaves members briefly in
262	    # STARTUP2/RECOVERING and pods Ready staggered, so the PRIMARY/SECONDARY and
263	    # readyReplicas tallies read short. Poll to convergence (~120s, 5s between
264	    # attempts); assertions unchanged.
265	    deadline = time.monotonic() + 120
266	    errors = []
267	    while True:
268	        errors = _health_attempt()
269	        if not errors:
270	            break
271	        if time.monotonic() >= deadline:
272	            break
273	        time.sleep(5)
274	    return fail("MongoDB initialize health check failed:", errors)
275	
276	
277	def check_data():
278	    errors = []
279	    pod = find_primary()
280	    res = mongo_eval(
281	        pod,
282	        f"db.getSiblingDB('{APP_DATABASE}').{APP_COLLECTION}.countDocuments({{}})",
283	    )
284	    if res.returncode != 0:
285	        detail = res.stderr.strip() or res.stdout.strip() or f"exit {res.returncode}"
286	        errors.append(f"Failed to read {APP_DATABASE}.{APP_COLLECTION}: {detail}")
287	    else:
288	        raw = (res.stdout or "").strip()
289	        if not raw.isdigit() or int(raw) < SEED_DOCS:
290	            errors.append(f"Expected >= {SEED_DOCS} docs in {APP_DATABASE}.{APP_COLLECTION}, got {raw}")
291	
292	    return fail("MongoDB initialize data check failed:", errors)
293	
294	
295	def main():
296	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
297	    parser.add_argument("--check", default="all", choices=["all", "topology", "health", "data"])
298	    args = parser.parse_args()
299	
300	    if args.check == "topology":
301	        return check_topology()
302	    if args.check == "health":
303	        return check_health()
304	    if args.check == "data":
305	        return check_data()
306	
307	    for fn in (check_topology, check_health, check_data):
308	        rc = fn()
309	        if rc != 0:
310	            return rc
311	    print("MongoDB initialize verified")
312	    return 0
313	
314	
315	if __name__ == "__main__":
316	    sys.exit(main())
